headline: WHOOP Launches Specialized Panels to Deliver Deeper, More Personalized Health Insights
summary: BOSTON, April 16, 2026--WHOOP, the human performance company, today announced the launch of Specialized Panels, a new line of targeted blood tests designed to deliver deeper insight into specific areas of health. As part of the company’s Advanced Labs offering, Specialized Panels, powered exclusively by Quest Diagnostics in the United States, allow WHOOP members to take blood biomarker testing further, focusing on the categories that matter most to their individual goals.

headline: City of Hope to Evaluate Quest Diagnostics' Haystack MRD® for Guiding Patient Management in Multiple Cancers
summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), a leading provider of diagnostic information services, today announced that City of Hope, one of the largest and most advanced cancer research and treatment organizations in the United States, is implementing Haystack MRD®, a highly accurate circulating-tumor DNA (ctDNA) minimal residual disease (MRD) test, for clinical trial participants with solid tumor cancers to help guide disease management for patients being treated for breast, colorectal, ovarian and prostat

content.title: City of Hope to Evaluate Quest Diagnostics' Haystack MRD® for Guiding Patient Management in Multiple Cancers
content.summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), a leading provider of diagnostic information services, today announced that City of Hope, one of the largest and most advanced cancer research and treatment organizations in the United States, is implementing Haystack MRD®, a highly accurate circulating-tumor DNA (ctDNA) minimal residual disease (MRD) test, for clinical trial participants with solid tumor cancers to help guide disease management for patients being treated for breast, colorectal, ovarian and prostat
